feed.title: Gin and Miskatonic
feed.subtitle: People say war is hell. We survived the war. If you need smart and tough investigators, we're your lads.

entry.title: Episode 3 - To the Wilds of South America - June 12, 2022

link.title: Episode 3 - To the Wilds of South America - June 12, 2022

entry.summary: Present John - Keeper Todd - “Skinny Larry” Simons, Inventor and jazz musician Scott - Ritter Gunter von Stiglitz, former German POW Cyle - Aaron Winters, Explorer and Occultist Tom - Oxford “Ox” Sykes, chemist and well-to-do ne’er-do-well Eric - Gerald “Gentleman Jerry” O’Shea, former bare-knuckles boxer Journal Preamble: A visit to the Asylum to pass good words and religious ...
